The #PlatformEngineeringDay greatness at the #KubeCon #CloudNativeCon doesn't stop: now we got @hazelweakly.me talking about building extensible platforms!

Things usually go this way: Strong components → system → complexity → components → ... Is the cycle unavoidable?

I wish there were more "outsider guides" to technologies, that explained what it is for people who hear about it or are adjacent to it but don't need to use it. Like what is Kubernetes? What problems does it solve? What makes it a hard problem to solve? What are the legendary warts?
@cra.dev shares this is the largest KubeCon ever - 13,500 attendees, up 10% from last year. Growth of cloud native is super impressive. #kubeconeu2026

Sadly, I will not be at KubeCon this week. To show all my kubernaut friends just how much I miss you, I have a small gift.

If you missed out on getting a deck of Exploding Clusters cards, well now you can play online.

exploding.k8s.io

Go easy on me, it's just a "free time" project.

Have fun!
AI Runway as explained by @squillace.bsky.social at the #KubeCon Azure pre-day: deploy and manage large language models on Kubernetes. github.com/kaito-projec...

Kubernetes gets much easier to manage when Git becomes the source of truth for your deployments. Here, Olumoko shows you how to implement GitOps on Kubernetes with Argo CD + GitHub Actions. You'll learn how to automate stuff, deploy manifests from Git, & more.
www.freecodecamp.org/news/how-to-...

about to fly to amsterdam for kubecon, first time out of north america 

gonna be hosteling around europe for a month after like the teenager i refuse to admit i'm not 

wish me luck!

KubeCon EU 2026 starts tomorrow! Badge pickup is open today from 8:00–18:00 CET at Entrance C & Entrance K. Plan your week, explore the sessions, and get ready for an amazing KubeCon experience. events.linuxfoundation.org/kubecon-clou...
Amsterdam at night. #kubecon

So Kubecon EU is fucking ENORMOUS. I will report on numbers later but first impressions are just that it's simply very big. The @cncf.io is evidently still a critical foundation (pun intended) for modern software workloads.

Career update: I’m founding engineer for a k8s native cluster orchestration team to expand ml workload scheduling options. 😭🙏❤️

(starting off with Kueue, duh 😜) 
Ready for the challenge!

Kicking off #KubeCon week with @rejekts.io! @joshleecreates.bsky.social  and I were back on stage together, delivering our #OpenTelemetry vendor neutrality talk. 

As always, Rejekts was awesome. So nice to see old friends and to meet new ones!!

I cried. I laughed.
Monkigras (resilience theme, every talk hit). Paris with @betty now headed to KubeCon EU. FluxCon, KubeAuto Day, & a women's panel Wednesday at the AWS booth I'm really looking forward to.
It's been a hard season. This  community is why I'm here.

Zero changes to the legacy code

Clean architecture for AI-ready enterprise systems.

recent_posts.text: Ricardo Rocha of CERN and Klaus Ohlmann of Mountain-Wave-Project talk about a glider which uses Kubernetes for “a real-time experiment at the intersection of physics, climate science, and AI”. Amazing presentation at #KubeCon! highaltitudelab.com

"Measuring cosmic rays variation at height."

CERN = systematic WOW use cases. We're so lucky to have such a collaborative and scientific organization around, and moreso to have them use and contribute to open source in such way. 

Love all of it, that was a great great closing #KubeCon keynote !

Crash course on gliding : the #KubeCon #CloudNativeCon is always full of pleasant surprises ! 

Wouldn't have expected otherwise from a keynote Ricardo Rocha is involved in ♥

The project of getting scientific insights from glider flights is really cool and so impressive on the implementation

From request to Gateway to advanced interface routing to prefill to decode to response, all running on Kubernetes in a standard-based way. Love it !

YAY,  first day of #KubeCon #CloudNativeCon, first live demo ! That's the spirit I love this conference for. Even if scripted locally, at least we're seeing it work for real. 

Props to Janet Kuo from Google for demoing us what a Kubernetes-compliant AI platform looks like 👏

#KubeCon EU starts today and guess what? Our very own @suidpit.sh will be on stage with a panel about the @kubernetes.io Security Audit we performed during 2025 with the support of @ostifofficial.bsky.social!

🗓️ March 25 - 16:45 CET
📍 Hall 8 | Room F

recent_posts.text:
The end goal: make inference workloads a first class citizen in Kubernetes.

And for that,  LLM-d is joining the @cncf.io 🎉

Open Source for AI on stage here at #KubeCon #CloudNativeCon,  with llm-d.ai on stage sharing about the challenges of hosting LLMs

Inference Gateway provides LLM-aware routing answering the challenge already highlighted last year the traditional routing doesn't suit the statefulness nature of LLMs
llm-d is joining the #CNCF as Sandbox project! 🤩 #KubeCon

Paraphrasing something I heard at the opening #kubecon keynote:

Most hard problems can't be solved independently.

True for technology. True for humanity.

It's the first day of KubeCon and AI is yet everywhere.

Let's discover Llm-d a new project for inference distribution.
llm-d.ai
#KubeCon
Whooooose at Kubecon 👀👀

Llm-d now part of the CNCF 
A key project to allow AI to leverage the cloud-native ecosystem for scalable inference
